description: School field trip permission and details

events.title: Field Trip - California Science Museum
events.location: California Science Museum, 700 Museum Way, San Francisco, CA 94107
events.description: 4th grade field trip to science museum with guided tour and planetarium show

events.title: Field Trip to California Science Museum
events.location: California Science Museum, 700 Museum Way, San Francisco, CA 94107
events.description: Field trip for 4th grade students to the California Science Museum on Thursday, March 12, 2026. Departure from school at 8:30 AM via bus. Arrival at museum at 9:30 AM. Guided tour and exhibits from 9:30 AM to 11:30 AM. Lunch (bring bag lunch) from 11:30 AM to 12:15 PM. Planetarium show and free exploration from 12:15 PM to 1:30 PM. Depart museum at 2:00 PM. Return to school at 3:00 PM (regular dismissal). Cost: $15 per student (covers admission, planetarium, and bus). Payment deadline: March 5, 2026. Students should bring bag lunch (no glass), water bottle, comfortable walking shoes, and light jacket. Permission form attached — please sign and return by March 5th.
